languages.text: Архимилитант Ведка Дунавски верно служила династии на протяжении десятков лет, воодушевляя бойцов Заркова своим примером. Каждая тяжелая рана, полученная ей, только закаляла ее характер — и добавляла железа в ее тело. Ведка погибла, подавляя бунт на одной из новых колоний протектората, убитая рукой коменданта, которому сама же доверила следить за безопасностью колонии.

Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski served the dynasty faithfully for decades, inspiring the fighters of Zarkov by her example. Each grievous wound she received only served to toughen her further — and add more iron to her body. Vedka died suppressing an uprising on one of the protectorate's new colonies, killed by the commandant she had trusted to oversee the colony's security.
languages.original_text: Архимилитант Ведка Дунавски верно служила династии на протяжении десятков лет, воодушевляя бойцов Заркова своим примером. Каждая тяжелая рана, полученная ей, только закаляла ее характер — и добавляла железа в ее тело. Ведка погибла, подавляя бунт на одной из новых колоний протектората, убитая рукой коменданта, которому сама же доверила следить за безопасностью колонии.

Each grievous wound she received only served to toughen her further — and add more iron to her body. languages.text: ヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキーは、歴代の王家のために数十年間忠誠を尽くし、ザルコフの戦士たちに勇気を与えた。彼女が受けた重傷は、彼女をさらに強くし、彼女の身体に鉄をさらに加えた。ヴェドカは、王家の保護領の新コロニーで起きた反乱を鎮圧中に、コロニーの治安を任せていた信頼できる司令官に殺された。
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski served the dynasty faithfully for decades, inspiring the fighters of Zarkov by her example. Each grievous wound she received only served to toughen her further — and add more iron to her body. Vedka died suppressing an uprising on one of the protectorate's new colonies, killed by the commandant she had trusted to oversee the colony's security.

traits.locale_text: ヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキーは、歴代の王家のために数十年間忠誠を尽くし、ザルコフの戦士たちに勇気を与えた。彼女が受けた重傷は、彼女をさらに強くし、彼女の身体に鉄をさらに加えた。ヴェドカは、王家の保護領の新コロニーで起きた反乱を鎮圧中に、コロニーの治安を任せていた信頼できる司令官に殺された。

languages.text: 首席战士薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡忠诚地为王朝服役数十年，以身作则激励着扎尔科夫的战士们。每一次重伤都让她愈发坚韧，也为她的身躯增添更多钢铁。薇德卡最终死于镇压属地新殖民地叛乱的战斗中，而杀死她的人正是她曾信任并委以殖民地安保重任的指挥官。
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski served the dynasty faithfully for decades, inspiring the fighters of Zarkov by her example. Each grievous wound she received only served to toughen her further — and add more iron to her body. Vedka died suppressing an uprising on one of the protectorate's new colonies, killed by the commandant she had trusted to oversee the colony's security.

traits.locale_text: 首席战士薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡忠诚地为王朝服役数十年，以身作则激励着扎尔科夫的战士们。每一次重伤都让她愈发坚韧，也为她的身躯增添更多钢铁。薇德卡最终死于镇压属地新殖民地叛乱的战斗中，而杀死她的人正是她曾信任并委以殖民地安保重任的指挥官。

languages.text: L'archimilitante Vedka Dunawski servit fidèlement la dynastie plusieurs décennies durant et devint un modèle pour les autres combattants de Zarkov. Les terribles blessures qu'elle subit ne firent que l'endurcir davantage, au sens propre comme au figuré, car chacune était l'occasion de renforcer son corps à l'aide de métal. Elle mourut en réprimant un soulèvement dans l'une des nouvelles colonies du protectorat, tuée par le commandant auquel elle avait confié la sécurité de la planète.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski served the dynasty faithfully for decades, inspiring the fighters of Zarkov by her example. Each grievous wound she received only served to toughen her further — and add more iron to her body. Vedka died suppressing an uprising on one of the protectorate's new colonies, killed by the commandant she had trusted to oversee the colony's security.

Les terribles blessures qu'elle subit ne firent que l'endurcir davantage, au sens propre comme au figuré, car chacune était l'occasion de renforcer son corps à l'aide de métal. Elle mourut en réprimant un soulèvement dans l'une des nouvelles colonies du protectorat, tuée par le commandant auquel elle avait confié la sécurité de la planète.

languages.text: La Archimilitante Vedka Dunawski sirvió a la dinastía con lealtad durante décadas, y su ejemplo inspiró a los guerreros de Zarkov. Cada grave herida que sufría solo servía para hacerla más fuerte... y añadir más hierro a su cuerpo. Vedka murió sofocando la rebelión de una de las nuevas colonias del protectorado, asesinada por el comandante al que había confiado la seguridad de la colonia.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski served the dynasty faithfully for decades, inspiring the fighters of Zarkov by her example. Each grievous wound she received only served to toughen her further — and add more iron to her body. Vedka died suppressing an uprising on one of the protectorate's new colonies, killed by the commandant she had trusted to oversee the colony's security.

traits.locale_text: La Archimilitante Vedka Dunawski sirvió a la dinastía con lealtad durante décadas, y su ejemplo inspiró a los guerreros de Zarkov. Cada grave herida que sufría solo servía para hacerla más fuerte... y añadir más hierro a su cuerpo. Vedka murió sofocando la rebelión de una de las nuevas colonias del protectorado, asesinada por el comandante al que había confiado la seguridad de la colonia.

languages.text: Başmilitan Vedka Dunawski, onlarca yıl boyunca hanedanlığa sadakatle hizmet etti ve Zarkov savaşçılarına ilham verdi. Aldığı her ağır yara onu daha da sertleştirmeye ve vücuduna daha fazla demir eklemeye yaradı. Vedka, protektoranın yeni kolonilerinden birinde bir ayaklanmayı bastırdığı sırada koloninin güvenliğini denetlemesi için güvendiği komutan tarafından öldürüldü.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski served the dynasty faithfully for decades, inspiring the fighters of Zarkov by her example. Each grievous wound she received only served to toughen her further — and add more iron to her body. Vedka died suppressing an uprising on one of the protectorate's new colonies, killed by the commandant she had trusted to oversee the colony's security.

traits.locale_text: Başmilitan Vedka Dunawski, onlarca yıl boyunca hanedanlığa sadakatle hizmet etti ve Zarkov savaşçılarına ilham verdi. Aldığı her ağır yara onu daha da sertleştirmeye ve vücuduna daha fazla demir eklemeye yaradı. Vedka, protektoranın yeni kolonilerinden birinde bir ayaklanmayı bastırdığı sırada koloninin güvenliğini denetlemesi için güvendiği komutan tarafından öldürüldü.

languages.text: Erzmilitantin Vedka Dunawski war der Dynastie mehrere Jahrzehnte lang treu ergeben und inspirierte die Kämpfer von Zarkov mit ihrem Beispiel. Jede Wunde, die sie erlitt, machte sie nur noch härter ... und verstärkte ihren Körper mit zusätzlichem Eisen. Vedka starb bei der Niederschlagung eines Aufstandes in einer der neuen Kolonien des Protektorats. Ihr Mörder war ausgerechnet der Kommandant, der für die Sicherheit der Kolonie sorgen sollte.
